sql_injection.diff.description: SQL injection via string interpolation in Flask route

expected_findings.label: SQL injection in search_users via f-string query
SQL injection in get_user via f-string query

null_reference.diff.description: Accessing attributes on a None return value without null check

expected_findings.label: NoneType subscript on payment_method when user has no payment method

off_by_one.diff.description: Off-by-one errors in pagination and batch processing

expected_findings.label: paginate start index should be (page-1)*page_size for 1-based pages
get_page_count uses integer division, misses remainder page
get_surrounding_items negative start index causes unexpected slice

hardcoded_secret.diff.description: API keys and credentials hardcoded in source code

expected_findings.label: Hardcoded Stripe secret key
Hardcoded OpenAI API key
Hardcoded AWS credentials
Hardcoded JWT secret
Hardcoded SMTP password

race_condition.diff.description: TOCTOU race in async check-then-act without locking

expected_findings.label: Race condition in check_and_increment: read-await-write without lock
Race condition in transfer: balance check-await-deduct without lock

xss_vulnerability.diff.description: Reflected XSS via unescaped user input in HTML response

expected_findings.label: Reflected XSS: username/bio/query injected into HTML without escaping
Stored XSS: comment and author rendered without escaping

buffer_overflow.diff.description: Unsafe C string functions leading to buffer overflow

expected_findings.label: Buffer overflow: strcpy into fixed-size buffer without bounds check
Buffer overflow: unbounded strcpy in tokenize loop
Buffer overflow: sprintf without size limit
Multiplies by discount instead of (1 - discount); charges discount amount not discounted price
Trial eligibility uses OR instead of AND; users with previous trials still qualify if old enough
Tax calculation subtracts rate from subtotal instead of multiplying

missing_validation.diff.description: Missing input validation enabling path traversal and command injection

expected_findings.label: Path traversal: filename from user input used directly in file path
Path traversal: user-controlled path passed to send_file
Command injection: user input passed to subprocess with shell=True
No validation on email format, age range, or username content

insecure_deserialization.diff.description: Untrusted data deserialized via pickle, yaml.load, and marshal

expected_findings.label: Insecure deserialization: pickle.loads on user-controlled cookie data
Insecure deserialization: yaml.load with unsafe Loader on user input
Insecure deserialization: marshal.loads on user-submitted bytecode
Insecure deserialization: pickle.loads on backup blob
Insecure deserialization: pickle.loads on webhook body
